# MemForks

> Git for AI agent memory. MemForks is branch-aware, verifiable, mergeable memory for autonomous agents, built on top of MemWal, Walrus, and Sui.

MemForks adds lineage to AI memory: branches inherit prior context, diverge independently, and merge trusted knowledge back. MemWal provides encrypted storage and semantic recall; MemForks provides branch semantics, commit history, merge governance, SDKs, and framework adapters.

## Start Here

- [Quickstart](/getting-started/quickstart): Install the CLI, provision a testnet tree, verify setup, and make a first branch commit.
- [Concepts Overview](/concepts/overview): Understand MemWal vs MemForks, memory lineage, branches, commits, and merge proposals.
- [Branching and Merging](/concepts/branching): Learn branch creation, commit, recall, semantic diff, semantic merge, and governed merge.
- [Architecture](/architecture/): System architecture across applications, adapters, core SDK, MemWal, Sui, and Walrus.
- [Data Flows](/architecture/data-flows): Recall, commit, branch, merge, Vercel AI, and LangGraph flow diagrams.

## SDK And Adapter Docs

- [Core SDK](/sdk/core): Direct `@memfork/core` usage for `connect`, `commit`, `recall`, `branch`, `proposeMerge`, delegates, and sponsorship.
- [Vercel AI SDK Adapter](/sdk/vercel-ai): Use `@memfork/vercel-ai` with `generateText`, `streamText`, `generateObject`, `withMemForks`, and `createMemForksModel`.
- [LangGraph Adapter](/sdk/langgraph): Use `@memfork/langgraph` as a checkpointer that maps LangGraph threads to MemForks branches.
- [CLI](/cli/): Provision, diagnose, install IDE integrations, branch, commit, recall, diff, merge, and manage delegates.

## Examples

- [Branch-Aware Chat](/examples/chat): Next.js and Vercel AI SDK reference app with branch picker, diff panel, and merge flow.
- [LangGraph Research](/examples/research): Multi-agent LangGraph workflow with checkpointed worker branches and supervisor synthesis.

## Guides

- [Multi-User Apps](/guides/multi-user): Branch namespace patterns for authenticated apps, server-owned trees, and user-owned trees.
- [Developer Bounties](/guides/bounties): Beginner-friendly project ideas that must demonstrate fork, divergence, and merge or rewind.

## Operations

- [Gas Sponsorship](/operations/sponsor): Run a sponsor service for Sui transactions.
- [Troubleshooting](/operations/troubleshooting): Fix config, credential, relayer, Vercel AI, LangGraph, and sponsor issues.

## Key Packages

- `@memfork/core`: TypeScript SDK.
- `@memfork/vercel-ai`: Vercel AI SDK middleware.
- `@memfork/langgraph`: LangGraph checkpointer.
- `@memfork/cli`: CLI for provisioning and operations.

## Repository Paths

- `packages/core/`: Core SDK.
- `packages/vercel-ai/`: Vercel AI adapter.
- `packages/langgraph/`: LangGraph adapter.
- `packages/cli/`: CLI.
- `apps/memforks-chat/`: Vercel AI reference app.
- `apps/memforks-research/`: LangGraph reference app.
- `services/sponsor/`: Gas sponsor service.
